title: Inevitable Squeaky Flashing Play Balls for Dogs, Flashing LED and Squeaker, choose from 3 assorted colours, Blue, Green or Pink (Blue)
features: Interactive Play: Squeaky and flashing LED when bounced or bitten, keeping dogs engaged and entertained.
Exercise Toy: Encourages physical activity and provides mental stimulation for dogs.
Vibrant Colours: Available in bright blue, green, and pink hues for visibility.
Durable Construction: Designed to withstand vigorous play and chewing.
Portable Size: Compact and lightweight for easy transport and playtime anywhere.
description: Product description Bring joy and excitement to your furry friend's playtime with these squeaky flashing play balls! These vibrant balls are designed to captivate your dog's attention with their bright colours and engaging sounds and lights. As your pup bounces or bites down on the ball, an internal squeaker emits an irresistible sound, while a flashing LED adds an extra element of fun. These interactive toys are perfect for keeping your canine companion entertained and promoting physical activity. The durable construction ensures long-lasting enjoyment, making these squeaky flashing play balls a delightful addition to your dog's toy collection. Encourage your furry pal to stay active and engaged with these stimulating play balls. Directions Tap ball for lights
